HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ORION FIRST FINANCIAL, L.L.C.'s Motion for Summary Judgment, Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Against Defendants Custom Landworks Utilities Llc, Jason Isenberger And Klint Davis.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.
